seo_title: Google's AI-Powered Search Includes More Ads
meta_description: Google is testing new ads within its AI Mode search experience, including sponsored products and chatbots that answer questions.
body_html:
Google's AI-powered Search era also extends to its ads, with Gemini AI model surfacing relevant items and generating custom explainer about why you should purchase a specific one.

Relevant Products Served in Search

  • Nespresso Vertuo Up espresso pod machine
  • Air freshener

The update comes just one day after Google revealed a new Search box for larger, more conversational queries, along with a focus on AI-generated results.

Chatbots in Ads

  • Google is testing new chatbot-style ads within its AI Mode search experience.
  • These ads will show an 'Ask a question' button, which you can press to start a conversation with Gemini.

The AI chatbot will then use the information from a product or service's website to answer your questions, and can also prompt you to fill out a form to put you in touch with the business.

Impact on User Experience

FeatureDescription
Sponsored ProductsSurface relevant items and generate custom explainer about why you should purchase a specific one.
ChatbotsShow an 'Ask a question' button, which you can press to start a conversation with Gemini.

These new ads seem even more in your face than the sponsored results introduced last year.

source.title: Google Search’s AI evolution includes more ads
source.summary: Google has updated its AI-powered search to include more ads, with the Gemini AI model now suggesting relevant products and generating custom explanations to encourage purchases when searching for specific items. This change is part of Google's ongoing evolution of its search capabilities. The update comes just one day after a new Search box was revealed for larger screens.
